word: H4122 - מַהֵר שָׁלָל חָשׁ בַּז - Mahêr Shâlâl Châsh Baz - mah-hare' shaw-lawl' khawsh baz - Maher-sha-lal-bash-baz

sections.paragraph:
Original: מהר שׁלל חשׁ בּז

Transliteration: mahêr shâlâl châsh baz

Phonetic: mah-hare' shaw-lawl' khawsh baz

BDB Definition:

= Maher-shalal-hash-baz " swift is booty, speedy is prey"
  1. symbolic name given by Isaiah by the Lord's direction to Isaiah's son; prophetic indication that Damascus and Samaria were soon to be plundered by the king of Assyria

Origin: from H4118 and H7998 and H2363 and H957

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
